• Implemented a self-supervised pretrained GNN pipeline for crystal-graph classification and candidate ranking.
• The pretrained GNN slightly improved CV AP over logistic regression, but overall signal was weak.
• Top-50 candidate precision: 0.06 (3 true positives in top 50)
• In this benchmark, generic crystal-graph learning alone was not enough for robust altermagnet discovery.
• The report argues that symmetry-aware, physics-informed descriptors are likely necessary for strong performance.
